entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where government policies focus on public participation and women's empowerment

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the case study of Powerguda is located

entities.name: SELF-HELP GROUPS
entities.description: Hamlet-level thrift groups headed by women that serve as social instruments to empower communities and fight poverty

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A state of economic hardship affecting millions in the semi-arid tropics and the target of community empowerment efforts

entities.name: WATERSHED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A public investment strategy used to transform livelihoods and increase household income in rural villages

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: New farming technologies implemented to improve the livelihoods of poor and indigenous farmers

entities.name: POWERGUDA
entities.description: A village in the Adilabad district of Andhra Pradesh that experienced significant economic and social transformation

entities.name: ADILABAD DISTRICT
entities.description: The administrative district in Andhra Pradesh where the village of Powerguda is situated

entities.name: COMMUNITY EMPOWERMENT
entities.description: A process involving public participation and women's empowerment that drives economic, social, and institutional growth

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOME
entities.description: An economic measure of family earnings which increased by 77% in Powerguda over three years

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A broad geographic region where poverty is widespread and the Powerguda transformation model can be replicated

entities.name: LOCAL GOVERNMENT SUPPORT
entities.description: A key driver of economic, social, and institutional growth in the village

entities.name: FINANCIAL LINKAGES
entities.description: Mechanisms used to leverage community savings into productive public investments for growth
